character.bio: Uninvited student to Guy, the 39th successor to Bushinryu. Kimberly had an ordinary upbringing, but she's a genuine prodigy who graduated college early...and now wants to be a ninja. Loves '80s pop culture.

kimberly_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Add +23 frames of advantage on Punish Counter

kimberly_crouching_medium_punch_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

kimberly_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

kimberly_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

kimberly_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

kimberly_water_slicer_slide_m.note: Knockdown on Punish Counter if it hits between active frames 1-4

kimberly_windmill_kick_h.note: Forces opponent to crouch on hit

kimberly_hisen_kick_h.note: Considered airborne from frames 18 - 32Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent* Recovery is reduced by 8 frames when blocked

kimberly_elbow_drop.level: (At the peak of a forward jump)  M
kimberly_elbow_drop.context: (At the peak of a forward jump)
kimberly_elbow_drop.input: (At the peak of a forward jump) ↓ + MP
kimberly_elbow_drop.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

kimberly_bushin_prism_strikes_4.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentRecovery is reduced by 5 frame on hit

kimberly_l_bushin_senpukyaku_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 11Considered airborne from frames 7 - 42Invincible to throws from frames 7 - 11

kimberly_m_bushin_senpukyaku_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 7 - 12Considered airborne from frames 8 - 45Invincible to throws from frames 8 - 12

kimberly_h_bushin_senpukyaku_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 8 - 13Considered airborne from frames 9 - 49Invincible to throws from frames 9 - 13

kimberly_od_bushin_senpukyaku.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 11Considered airborne from frames 7 - 47Invincible to throws from frames 7 - 11Only the 4th hit can be canceled into a Level 2 Super Art

kimberly_sprint.note: Kimberly can transition to branching attacks from the 8th frameAfter the 16th frame, if the opponent is within a certain distance, Kimberly will automatically perform Arc Step

kimberly_od_sprint.note: Kimberly can transition to Emergency Stop from the 6th frameKimberly can transition to Torso Cleaver, Shadow Slide and Neck Hunter from the 8th frameAfter the 14th frame, if the opponent is within a certain distance, Kimberly will automatically perform Arc Step

kimberly_od_neck_hunter.note: Produces a ground bound during a mid-air hit

kimberly_arc_step.level: (Automatically activates after getting close with Sprint)
kimberly_arc_step.context: (Automatically activates after getting close with Sprint)
kimberly_arc_step.note: Considered airborne from frames 7 - 41Can transition into branching attacks from frame 33

kimberly_od_arc_step.level: (Automatically activates after getting close with OD Sprint)
kimberly_od_arc_step.context: (Automatically activates after getting close with OD Sprint)
kimberly_od_arc_step.note: Considered airborne from frames 7 - 41Can transition into branching attacks from frame 33

kimberly_bushin_izuna_otoshi.note: With Classic ControlsDoes 1656 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 1324 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

kimberly_od_bushin_izuna_otoshi.note: With Classic ControlsDoes 1035 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 828 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

kimberly_od_bushin_hojin_kick.note: Only transitions to the 2nd attack on hitProduces a wall splat on hit

kimberly_m_vagabond_edge_m.note: * Will only transition to 2nd attack if the first attack hits

kimberly_h_vagabond_edge_h.note: * Will only transition to 2nd attack if the first attack hits   The 2nd attack can be canceled by a jump

kimberly_od_vagabond_edge.note: * Will only transition to 2nd attack if the first attack hits   The 2nd attack can be canceled by a jump

kimberly_hidden_variable.note: Completely invincible from frames 19 - 26Can be canceled into anything except walk/dashes, Drive Parry, Block and Hidden Variable from the 34th frame

kimberly_od_hidden_variable.note: Completely invincible from frames 20 - 27Can be canceled into a mid-air attack from the 34th frame* Landing recovery can be canceled by anything except walk/dashes

kimberly_genius_at_play.note: Adds a Shuriken Bomb stock on frame 43

kimberly_od_genius_at_play.note: Adds 2 Shuriken Bomb stock on frame 43

kimberly_l_shuriken_bomb.input: (With at least 1 Shuriken Bomb stock) ↓↓ + LP
kimberly_l_shuriken_bomb.note: Fires a projectile on the 18th frameDecreases the Shuriken Bomb stock by 1* Values represent when the attack is performed in the middle of the screen

kimberly_m_shuriken_bomb.input: (With at least 1 Shuriken Bomb stock) ↓↓ + MP
kimberly_m_shuriken_bomb.note: Fires a projectile on the 18th frameDecreases the Shuriken Bomb stock by 1* Values represent when the attack is performed in the middle of the screen

kimberly_h_shuriken_bomb.input: (With at least 1 Shuriken Bomb stock) ↓↓ + HP
kimberly_h_shuriken_bomb.note: Fires a projectile on the 18th frameDecreases the Shuriken Bomb stock by 1* Values represent when the attack is performed in the middle of the screen

kimberly_l_shuriken_bomb_spread.input: (With at least 2 Shuriken Bomb stocks) ↓↓ + PMP
kimberly_l_shuriken_bomb_spread.note: Fires 2 projectiles on the 18th frameDecreases the Shuriken Bomb stock by 2* Values represent when the attack is performed in the middle of the screen

kimberly_m_shuriken_bomb_spread.input: (With at least 2 Shuriken Bomb stocks) ↓↓ + PHP
kimberly_m_shuriken_bomb_spread.note: Fires 2 projectiles on the 18th frameDecreases the Shuriken Bomb stock by 2* Values represent when the attack is performed in the middle of the screen

kimberly_h_shuriken_bomb_spread.input: (With at least 2 Shuriken Bomb stocks) ↓↓ + PHP

kimberly_nue_twister.note: *Does 1656 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

kimberly_od_nue_twister.note: *Does 1035 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

kimberly_sa1_bushin_beats.note: Invincible to strikes and throws on frames 1 - 14Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

kimberly_sa1_bushin_thunderous_beats.level: (With at least 1 Shuriken Bomb stock)  Hold
kimberly_sa1_bushin_thunderous_beats.context: (With at least 1 Shuriken Bomb stock) (During Bushin Beats)
kimberly_sa1_bushin_thunderous_beats.input: (With at least 1 Shuriken Bomb stock) (During Bushin Beats) ?key-barrage.png?K
kimberly_sa1_bushin_thunderous_beats.note: Invincible to strikes and throws on frames 1 - 14Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

kimberly_sa2_bushin_scramble.note: Completely invincible on the 1st frameConsidered airborne from frames 1- 20Minimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

kimberly_sa2_soaring_bushin_scramble.note: Completely invincible on the 1st frameConsidered airborne from frame 1 and onMinimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

kimberly_sa3_bushin_ninjastar_cypher.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
kimberly_sa3_bushin_ninjastar_cypher.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
kimberly_sa3_bushin_ninjastar_cypher.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13On the first frame, the following boosts are activated and remain until the end of the match- Attack damage up 111%- Walk speed increasedMinimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

kimberly_ca_bushin_ninjastar_cypher.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
kimberly_ca_bushin_ninjastar_cypher.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + P
kimberly_ca_bushin_ninjastar_cypher.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 13On the first frame, the following boosts are activated and remain until the end of the match- Attack damage up 111%- Walk speed increasedMinimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

kimberly_ripcord_throw.note: Punish Counter properties- Damage set to 1838 (1839)- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Produces a Hard Knockdown

kimberly_bell_ringer.note: Punish Counter properties- Damage set to 1838 (1839)- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Produces a Hard Knockdown

kimberly_backward_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

kimberly_drive_impact_steadfast_strike.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

kimberly_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
kimberly_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
kimberly_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

kimberly_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

kimberly_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
kimberly_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
kimberly_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

kimberly_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

kimberly_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

kimberly_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

kimberly_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
kimberly_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
kimberly_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
